subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending all that was and shall be, befitteth the Self-Subsisting Lord Who, through the radiant light of His Word "Be!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ما کان و ما یکون حضرت قیومی را لایق و سزا که بانوار نیر کلمه کن
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
